vault.title: The Vault
vault.subtitle: The complete Aether data repository. Here lies the raw truth, filtered from marketing noise, backed by visual evidence and rigorous trust scoring. Transparency embodied.
vault.confirm_delete_all: Are you sure you want to delete all tools shown in the search results? This action cannot be undone!
vault.confirm_delete_tool: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{name}} from the repository?

activation.title: Welcome to Aether
activation.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to save tools and manage your technology stack.
activation.email_sent: We sent a magic sign-in link to
activation.terms_prefix: By continuing, you agree to our

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Aether preferences
settings.email_help: Contact support to change your linked email address.
settings.notif_stack_desc: Get notified when a saved tool updates its features.
settings.notif_newsletter_desc: A summary of the hottest AI tools of the week.
settings.security_info_title: Your account is protected with passwordless sign-in
settings.security_info_desc: We use Magic Links or identity providers (Google/GitHub) to maintain the highest level of security. No passwords to steal.
settings.login_history_desc: View devices that have signed into your account
settings.support_desc: Aether is now 100% community-supported. By running our AI models locally (Zero-API), we eliminated third-party costs and privacy risks. Your support covers our infrastructure and keeps the compass spinning.

compare.title: Comparison Matrix
compare.subtitle: Make data-driven decisions. Compare the technical capabilities, costs, and performance of the leading AI tools head-to-head.
compare.search_placeholder: Search for a tool to compare...
compare.empty_desc: Select at least one tool to start comparing data and performance.
compare.max_tools_error: You can compare up to 3 tools at a time.

use_cases.title: Use Case Index
use_cases.subtitle: Browse hundreds of verified tools organized by industry and business needs. Select a category to focus your search.
use_cases.search_placeholder: Search category or industry (e.g., video, marketing)...

about.noise_subtitle: The internet is flooded with shallow indices. Results bought with marketing budgets, not earned with quality.
about.problem_subtitle: When searching for an AI solution for a critical task, the first results are rarely the best. They are simply the ones with the largest SEO budgets.
about.solution_subtitle: We developed internally an autonomous network of agents that challenge marketing hype with field-verified performance audits.
about.pillar_brand_desc: Our Trust Score is decoupled from commercial influence. It is calculated through clinical and mathematical auditing only.
about.pillar_field_desc: Our agents execute real-world scenarios to ensure the marketing promise matches actual capability on the ground.
about.pillar_intent_desc: Architectural search that logicizes your goal (the Intent), providing precise solutions instead of blind keyword matching.
about.zero_api_subtitle: Privacy is not a feature; it's the foundation. We run local ONNX embeddings and logic engines — never sending your raw queries to third-party APIs for processing.
about.scout_subtitle: Our agents don't just read documentation; they probe limits, verify pricing, and check for hidden limitations.

not_found.title: 404 - Page Not Found
not_found.subtitle: You've reached an area void of insights.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have information on a tool we missed? Want to report an inaccuracy in our laboratory data? We are here to listen.
contact.success_subtitle: We've received your message. Our team will review it and get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.placeholder_content: Explain your request or inquiry here...
contact.fast_response: We respond clinically fast, usually within hours.

api_docs.subtitle: Direct access to Aether's clinical database. We are opening early access for developers building objective recommendation engines, procurement agents, and research platforms.
api_docs.rest_graphql: Flexible queries across all data models - learning curve, shadow pricing, and Trust Score metrics.
api_docs.intent_engine: Bypass traditional keyword search. Send a raw Intent and receive a prioritized array of tools field-verified by our agents.
api_docs.zero_bias: Guaranteed by SLA: No sponsored placements in organic API responses. Data remains pure and resilient to commercial influence.
api_docs.success_subtitle: Our architects will review the details, and we'll get back to you once we release more API keys.
api_docs.limited_keys: Key availability is strictly limited during the initial alpha phase to ensure server stability.
api_docs.use_case_placeholder: What are you building with Aether?

analytics.title: Intent Analytics
analytics.subtitle: What are users really looking for? Real-time data on search intents.
